calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for petition's for compromise of minor's claims of Ellie Polnar, Gabriel Polnar, and Zev Polnar.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing 11:01:57 a.m. and concluding at 11:09:08 a.m.

Plaintiff Roman Polnar appearing represented by Jim Burns, Esq.
Defendant John P. Halverson not appearing.

Petition to Approve Compromise of Minor's Claim of Ellie Polnar previously granted on 07/07/2022. $4,100.00 settlement funds to be deposited into blocked account. Court ordered the matter continued to this date for Plaintiff to identify the financial institution that the deposit will be made. Amended petition filed 08/15/2022 identifying Wells Fargo as the financial institution.

Petition to Approve Compromise of Minor's Claim of Gabriel Polnar previously granted on 07/07/2022. $4,100.00 settlement funds to be deposited into blocked account. Court ordered the matter continued to this date for Plaintiff to identify the financial institution that the deposit will be made. Amended petition filed 08/15/2022 identifying Wells Fargo as the financial institution.

Petition to Approve Compromise of Minor's Claim of Zev Polnar previously granted on 07/07/2022. $4,100.00 settlement funds to be deposited into blocked account. Court ordered the matter continued to this date for Plaintiff to identify the financial institution that the deposit will be made. Amended petition filed 08/15/2022 identifying Wells Fargo as the financial institution.

Clerk to make modifications to proposed orders as set forth on the record.
Modified proposed orders to be signed.

Court orders matter continued to 11/08/2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for progress report on the deposit of funds into a blocked account.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Continued To Sep-08-22 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Continued To Feb-16-22 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-05-2021 Continued To Dec-07-21 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Paul Shiau To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Dara L. Silveira, Esq. of KELLER BENVENUTTI KIM LLP, T:415.364.6790, for plaintiff/ moving party;
Patrick Tuck, Esq. of WENDEL ROSEN LLP, T:510.834.6600, for defendant/ opposing party.

RULING: The matter was contested and argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT PAUL SHIAU's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment as follows:

Defendant's motion for relief from default and for relief from default judgment is denied in its entirety.

Defendant establishes no basis to set aside the default, as his motion is untimely.

[See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.]

Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order by email, with a copy to opposing counsel.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
